prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L V6 TFSI (EA839/CGWB) with a custom Stage 2+ ECU remap by APR (software version APR30TFSI-002) targeting 520 HP and 550 lb-ft torque, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) and a custom 3.5-inch downpipe with a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with a Vibrant 1799 resonator for drone reduction).

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 400mm strut length) with custom valving for the A7's 4-link rear axle, paired with Ohlins TTX46 front and TTX40 rear dampers (rebound/compression adjustable) and H&R 20mm front / 15mm rear sway bars (part #51660) for reduced body roll.

Drivetrain: 034 Motorsport Stage 3 clutch kit (multi-plate ceramic, 800 Nm torque capacity) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel (10.5 lbs) and a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QKE30Y) for the 8-speed ZF 8HP75 transmission, paired with a custom driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch carbon fiber, rated for 1,000 HP).
estetica: Aero: Prior Design PD800RS widebody kit (carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders) with a custom 3-piece front splitter (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and a Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 4-inch diffuser tunnels with integrated LED brake light).

Wheels: Rotiform LAS-R 20x10.5 ET35 (front) and 20x11.5 ET40 (rear) in gloss black with custom concave profiles, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear) for optimal heat cycling and track use.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA-approved 6-point harness slots) with custom Alcantara/leather upholstery (Nappa leather bolsters, Alcantara center panels), paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip) and a custom roll cage by VAC Motorsports (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in with harness bar).
